reviews.title: Westin
reviews.text: You allowed me to be bumped to a lesser hotel no message from you and no credit this is unacceptable I will stop using agoda and never stay at Westin unless I receive credit from agoda and Westin where I was sent was super eight level I am upset

reviews.title: Total rip off . Not a good value. Stay elsewhere. I had bums approaching me every time. Police rep
reviews.negatives: Everything

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Dirty carpet floor. Room entrance is compact. Customer service was poor

reviews.title: Hostile & Unprofessional
reviews.positives: The location & view of the room .
reviews.negatives: I called to see how loud I could have the TV and the operator said 15 . You couldn’t hear anything ! The security was called from the racist neighbor next door & the security was even worse to deal with ! He was so rude along with the operator on the phone . He said he could hear my conversation through the door (I had the bayview large room) which was a distance from the bed to the door . God forbid that I even wanted to celebrate Valentines Day if you know what I mean . The overall experience was hostile & unprofessional! $400 down the drain !

reviews.title: Not good hotel, no hot water, no wifi
Did not stay here - had to change due to barricaded door and could NOT park or enter the lobby.
reviews.negatives: Upon arrival, there was a barricade blocking the door and could not enter.  There was no one there for valet parking or to give information for parking.  We did not feel safe and had to change to a different Westin (within 30 minutes of booking).  Now, I just received a charge for cancellation.  We could NOT EVEN get in the door to enter the lobby.  This is ridiculous that almost 1 month later, I get a cancellation notice and charge AND also a rating request.  This is extremely unorganized and unprofessional and seems as if someone is not taking care of the business.  Now, I am in the dispute process.  Another negative impact.  I knew when the door was barricaded, it was somewhere we should not stay.

reviews.title: San Diego Escapade
reviews.text: Hotel Room is average for family that will visit San Diego for a tour. Clean room and friendly staff. But one thing i dont like there is charges on top of what you paid for upon booking like Taxes and Fees, Destination Fee,etc. So better check inclusions before confirming your booking coz it is very hard to reach them to verify details of charges we had in the credit card we used in the hotel upon checking in

reviews.title: I left my beats headphones on my bed. I realized after we already almost home, I called and asked the front desk to plea
reviews.negatives: Dishonest staff

reviews.title: Other than new, I won’t recommend stay at this Westin. The staff is not responsible at all for the incidents and propert
reviews.negatives:
Difficult parking
Additional destination fee
I lost my t-shirt with room service
The room is not fully cleaned on the last day of my stay

reviews.title: Decent hotel for business but not leisure.
reviews.text: Not bad, but I think the hotel needs few upgrades on their facilities and buildings.

reviews.title: Horrible experience will not be returning
reviews.negatives:
staff was horrible 
I came with my 2 disabled parents there was no help to unload our luggage they just gave us a cart to unload everything ( keep in mind I had my mother in a wheelchair and my dad who’s disabled himself ) the cart ended up falling and hit my car and my car is now damaged. This could’ve been all avoided if they had the proper staffing to help us unload our belongings.

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: i had difficulty finding the hotel entrance as it is not facing the main road. the room is a little bit small but bed was comfortable. for self-driving traveller, there is a carpark right opposite the hotel which charge alot cheaper than the hotel valet parking. the hotel lobby does provide free wifi but it require frequent login.
reviews.positives: Gaslamp Quaters is just 15-20 minutes walk!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: The air conditioning in our room was broken so we contacted maintenance 3 different times throughout our stay and nothing was fixed. It felt like we were sleeping in a sauna for our Honeymoon. Extremely upsetting and did not accommodate the guests needs.

reviews.title: Extended stay
reviews.text: Extremely worn down hotel more as a transit lodge for United and Delta pilots. Certainly in no manner befits a Westin brand or standard. Was told that it’s because of COVID but pretty basic rooms, old furniture, carpets and a less than courteous staff.

reviews.title: Frustrating to say the least. I have stayed many times in the downtown area and this was by far the worst
reviews.negatives: Dirty room, told the staff about it and they said they would tell the manager. That never happened. I had to reach out regarding it and to “make it right” they were going to refund part of my stay… never happened either

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Paid parking for hotel guests while it shouldn't be

reviews.title: Reasonable Westin hotel
reviews.text: My stay with Westin was okay. I always stay Westin as I like their bed. However there were nothing around this hotel unless you walk few blocks. There are court house etc. next to the hotel and it was really quiet around the hotel. Having Seven Eleven around the corner was helpful but we had to walk to either seaside or gaslamp to eat or drink. You do need comfortable shoes if you stay here.
reviews.positives: Comforatble bed, friendly stuff and reasonable

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: The room was very small for the price. We were disappointed as we splurged for a nice hotel, anticipating a large, nice room. The room was extremely small and very average.
reviews.positives: The view of the bay was nice, room service was great, bed very comfortable

reviews.title: Good hotel for a weekend in San Diego
reviews.text: Good hotel for a weekend break in SD

reviews.title: Dont get confused with Hotel Westin Gaslamp
reviews.text:
Lovely hotel, good facilities, reasonable gym, fantastic cafe out front.
Just dont get confused with the Westin around the corner like we did when you try to check in.

reviews.title: many different food variety.
reviews.text: overall ifs fine, just disappointing that wifi is not provided in room.
reviews.positives: good location, easy to get public transport, close to attractions

reviews.title: Although it is far from the convention center.
reviews.text: I was satisfied. There was an airport shuttle, and the gym/pool/breakfast were all decent.

reviews.title: Very meeehhhh experience
reviews.text: Big bummer is the no parking on the facility.  There are charges after charges that I was not aware of.
reviews.room_type: Recently Renovated, Guest room, 1 King, City view

reviews.title: Great location for 1zt stay
reviews.text:
Too expensive, even on a 3 day deal,. All the add-on tax, parking, surcharge, no breakfast.
Will look elsewhere in the area at next visit.

reviews.title: Great hotel, felt right at home
reviews.text: Excellent and would stay again

reviews.title: Not worth the money.
reviews.negatives: The rooms were extremely warm, air conditioning did not work, the phone did not work and the cord to connect the phone was broken not able to use, mold in the bathroom,, food was terrible, no robes in the room, , fan in bathroom didn’t work and dust everywhere.

reviews.title: Comfortable stay
reviews.text: Comfortable stay and recomending for others. Friendly staff and quick service
reviews.positives: Worth stay for the amount paid, Comfortable and quick service

reviews.title: Genuine disappointment
reviews.positives: Nice location, great view from room
reviews.negatives:
Staff *totally* disengaged.  Front desk clerk told us we would have our rooms in 15 minutes, but it was much closer to an hour.  We were supposed to leave our luggage with the luggage guy and have the valets park our car.  They would call me when the room was done.

The baggage guy didn’t have any carts, so he “went to get one,” but we didn’t see him again.  I think he hit the end of his shift and disappeared.  

The head valet was obviously put out that we didn’t have an assigned room and that we didn’t have our luggage out of the car.  So we unloaded it and waited for someone at the desk to hold our luggage for us.

Eventually, we asked the front desk folks if they had rooms ready, and magically, they did.  They just didn’t bother to tell us.

Would I condemn Westin as a whole?  No.  But I’d ditch or retrain everyone we dealt with.

reviews.title: Comfortable stay
reviews.text: Worth stay for the amount paid. Comfortable & recomending for others

reviews.title: Comfortable stay
reviews.positives: Good value for money, comfortable stay and attentive staffs

reviews.title: Nice Location
reviews.text: Gaslamp and convention centre within easy walking distance. Room seem modern and clean, good and spacious. Didt eat at hotel so can not comment. Only negative is that the Amtrak is quite close and at night you can hear the klaxon as it passes the crossings. There is a shuttle for the airport which is a bonus.. all in all a good hotel at reasonable cost.
reviews.negatives: Lots of noise from the Amtrak

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: Generally a good experience staying here! Although the online chat to contact hotel is unresponsive, calling the hotel directly helps to resolve my booking inquiries.
reviews.room_type: Recently Renovated, Guest room, 1 King, City view

reviews.title: Elegant hotel just blocks from the Gaslamp
reviews.text: The heated pool & hot tub are on the 3rd floor outside which is great for the temperate San Diego climate.  Nice rooms and staff, convenient having a bar & restaurant in the hotel as well.

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: Parking expensive nice hotel clean good location

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: Very enjoyable stay. Comfort and quality throughout.

reviews.title: nice room,comfortable bed, helpful staff
reviews.text: We are extremely pleased with our 11 night stay in this Westin Hotel. The receptionist was nice enough to assign an ocean view room to us and the room was beautiful. My wife said the bed was the most comfy one she ever had in a hotel. Breakfast was nice too. You can't find a better loation than this: right in the downtown area and close to everything, but far enough from the noisy gaslamp area so you don't need to worry about being waken up by some loud party in the middle of night. The only things that we are not satisfied with are that only valet parking is available and the free internet will kick you out every hour

reviews.title: Westin, when am i getting my deposit back?!
reviews.negatives:
My deposit is still not refunded after 10 days, when will it be given back? This is highly disappointing.
I stayed in other properties in US during this holiday and they refunded immediately after my checkout.
Surprising a reputed brand is still holding up my money. 

Also I took the room and breakfast package but hotel did not honor breakfast for my young kids in the room. Nevertheless the breakfast buffet wasnt very great and average in taste.

The hotel needs some renovation and looks tired overall.

reviews.title: Nice and convenient
reviews.text: Got a last minute reservation and worked out great. Bed was comfy and room was clean.

reviews.title: very unsatisfied
reviews.positives: I liked that it over looked the city
reviews.negatives: While staying at this property the first night I was called about a noise complaint when the volume was room level. Then the manager stands at the door and just sits there. On both friday and saturday the cleaning/room service staff unlocks the door to the room both days while I was almost fully naked. No knock or response was given that anyone was at the door and they were actively unlocking and entering the room

reviews.title: Perfect loction for SDDT  and Coronado island travelers.
reviews.text:
5 min walk from Santa Fe Depot station.
10 min walk to Ferry station

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: that hotel is literally a scam , people pay all that money to stay for you have to pay for parking too and breakfast everything should come included, i will never be back

reviews.negatives: We were charged double each day for valet parking, when questioned we were told it was “an accident”. There were homeless people in the bathrooms washing themselves

reviews.title: Well for starters after I signed in at the desk I get handed my room card and was told enjoy my stay, the person never t
reviews.positives: It’s was a nice looking property.
reviews.negatives: After lobby hours it was very confusing trying to find where to enter.

reviews.title: Business hotel close to San Diego night life
reviews.text: Staff were very warm and welcoming. They were happy to answer all of my questions about the hotel and the surrounding area.

reviews.title: Great hotel; great service
reviews.text: Great hotel, facilities, staff, rooms were good; gym had reasonable facilities, pool was warm (and we were there in winter)

reviews.title: the hotel is awesome, has a great location close.
reviews.text: It has a cozy room and place. The loction of hotel is strategic. Service is great with nice StarB coffee shop in hotel

reviews.title: Within walking distance to incredible food in Little Italy, Gaslamp quarter and business  center

reviews.title: Le bon choix pour nous.
reviews.text: Idéalement situé si vous ne circulez pas en voiture. très proche des moyens de transport (tram...) pour se rendre vers les sites touristiques hors de la ville ( plages...). Dix minutes à pieds du centre ville très touristique , à ne pas manquer y compris le soir très animé et avec un grand choix de restaurant.

reviews.title: Vor Ort wurde eine "Facility Fee" in Höhe von 25 USD erhoben
reviews.text: Vor Ort wurde eine "Facility Fee" in Höhe von 25 USD erhoben

reviews.title: good hotel
reviews.text: とてもゆっくり過ごすことができるホテルで、部屋が綺麗。インターネットや駐車場の料金が別途となっているので、少し予算より高くなってしまうことが欠点。
reviews.positives: ホテルが清潔で、スタッフの対応も良い、周辺に美味しいビールレストランがある。

reviews.title: WESTIN　SANDIEGO
reviews.text: 料金の割に、部屋も広くゆったりしていました。交通の便もとても良く便利でした。近くに大きなモールが会ったり、スーパー等もあり快適に過ごす事が出来ました。また利用したいと思います。
reviews.positives: お部屋は広々としていてゆったりしていました。バス停や駅に近く便利でした。徒歩圏内に大きなモールがあったのも便利でした。
reviews.negatives: ベルサービスがなかなか来ず、催促してようやく来たが１時間要した。

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
ロケーション、部屋の広さ、申し分なく、スタッフも親切で感じの良いホテルでした。
バケーションフィー25%に含まれる、レンタサイクル、夕方の軽いスナックを利用しました。
プールが小さくて泳ぐ気にならなかったのが☆３つの理由です。
全体的には満足し、もう一泊したいくらいでした。

reviews.title: 위치 좋아요

유니언스테이션,USS 와 ferry station가까워 편리합니다.
수영장은 협소하지만 hot tub이 3층에 있어 좋아요.

reviews.title: It was noce but the ants ruined it
reviews.negatives: Ants in my room my bed stand and on the counter under the TV

reviews.title: 주차 불편
reviews.text: 전용 주차장이 없고  발렛 주차비용이 너무 비쌈

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Waited 30 min which is too long for shuttle.  While hotel offered some concessions the day we had to return to the airport and prearranged to get on a 6 PM shuttle. When we arrive to get our bags at the concierge, no one was there and the front attendant did not have keys to get them so we missed our shuttle and the shuttle driver apparently works as a concierge, but refused to get our bags and left without taking us. We had to take an Uber at our expense and rush anxiously through checkin to ensure we were not delayed. so we had a poor experience all over again for the exact same issues with poor shuttle service.

reviews.title: 영수증 보내주세요.
reviews.text: 현지에서는 영수증 발급 안해주고 아고다에 요청하려고 이메일 보냈는데 연락은 없고 전화 여러번했는데 전화도 안되네요.

reviews.title: Definetely not a 4-star hotel! Sad representation of the Upscale hotel chain owned by Marriott
reviews.negatives: We arrived at the Westin San Diego Bay around 3:30, paid for parking , couldn't check in , had to store our luggage , and then find somewhere to go (on the 4th of July evening) and wait for a call to let us know our room was ready, which was about 6pm. Staff was lacking in customer service skills. Only 2 employees, one front desk clerk and shuttle driver were spot on with customer service. We had to have our room keys reprogrammed several times throughout our 4 day stay because they failed to work for the elevator and room. The shower glass didn't cover the length of the spray of the huge shower head, so there was water all over the floor. There was a gust who had their dog on the deck next to us at the Jacuzzi.

reviews.title: 영수증 발급바랍니다. 아고다 한국 전화가 안되요
reviews.text: 현지 결재를 했는데 현지 호텔에서는 아고다에서 결대가 됐다고 하고 그래서 아고다 한국에 여러번 전화를 하고있는데 전화는 계속 안받네요. 인보이스 좀 빨리 보내주세요.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Great people, clean and appearance very good
reviews.negatives: requested a 2 pm chk in, got an email saying even eariler was acceptable an hour earlier, 1pm, then when we arrive at 3 pm, 2 hours past there respones and at regular chkin, there couldnt even chk us in at there regular time, there my family sat in there lobby way past 1pm, closer to 4,,  Miseable waiting in a lobby. Also tv not functioning correctly, maintaice comes and tells us so sorry nothing he can do, basically live with it, no options but sit there with the problum and maybe when you chk out the next day front desk will compensate in some way, gee thanks alot fo your premium service. 3rd, were give a coupon for a late afte snack, 4-5,,,  we show at 415-430,,, nothing available they said would be there, 1 small tray of some bread with somthing sweet smeared on it, then they were gone, finnaly gave up and just went back to room.

reviews.title: 离火车站，码头很近
reviews.text: 就在火车站旁边，步行10分钟可以达到航母、码头、酒吧区，环境舒适，是一个好的选择！
reviews.positives: 市中心，步行可达到景点，舒适

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: the view of the room was very nice, we were anle to see the city from the room which was nice. walking distance to a lot of places and the staff was okay
reviews.negatives:
our air conditioning wasn’t working in the unit and when we called to get it fixed we were told we have to wait till morning, which is inconvenient when you are staying somewhere in the middle of summer. we waited till
morning & still no maintenance. 
we tried to use the amenities such as the bar which was to open at noon & we got there around 1245 and she rudely told us she wasn’t open yet.

reviews.title: 位置！位置！位置！
reviews.text: 酒店位置优越，距煤气灯区、航母博物馆等步行距离，火车站近在咫尺，公交直达机场，各种交通工具在酒店附近都有停靠。酒店中规中矩，服务专业。值得一提的是酒店大堂的电脑可免费办理各航司登机、打印登机牌。

reviews.title: Poor
reviews.negatives: Check in was super slow, asked for extra blankets as I was traveling with 2 young kids, none arrived after 90 mins so had to go and get some then an hour later when I'm trying to get my kids to sleep house keeping knocked on the door ! Also took 35 mins to get 3 burgers

reviews.title: 很好的酒店
reviews.text: 市中心酒店，入住和退房都很快。房间也够大。周围还有另外一个westin,酒店附近可选的酒店非常多。附近吃饭很方便，酒店后面有一家karl啤酒吧，啤酒非常好喝，吃得也不错。靠近航母很近，走过去就可以了。离海也很近。

reviews.negatives: The AC made so much noise that we just had to turn it off. The cleaning lady didn’t clean properly and we smelled marijuana in the room multiple times.

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.negatives: The bathrooms didn’t work properly and the staff were not trained properly or didn’t know how to explain booking transaction procedures.

reviews.title: Not worthy of the Westin price
reviews.negatives: Facilties were outdated, when we first checked in our room had mold above the shower and was musty smelling. We were put in a different room but could fully shake the musty smell.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Location, Breakfast was great. Room clean. Staff nice.
reviews.negatives: Someone had gained access into my room while I was sleeping. Got moved to another room, still very distressing. I woke up and yelled what the F__k, it was a women’s voice, and she closed the door right away.

reviews.title: Run down, room smelled of mold & smoke. Value for the high cost was not
reviews.positives:
The Bed was very comfy
Staff were friendly 
Free airport shuttle
reviews.negatives:
My room had seen better days 
The room smelled like mold and smoke 
The tv had 3 working channels only 
The bath/shower combo was old 
Honestly for a Weston and for the cost it wasn’t worth it.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Location

reviews.title: it was average
reviews.negatives: the breakfast, restaurant, room seemed outdated.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Gave me molded tomatoes felt bad next day and left hotel to return home vacation ended

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: 400 dollars for a postcard size room with a pocket door for bathroom. O ly one washcloth for two people.

reviews.title: The charge for outdated hotel room was a disappointment but location was perfect as was the staff
reviews.positives: Hotel Location was perfect for our needs. The staff provided excellent service to our requests. The food was very good. Excellent maid service provided clean towels daily and cleaned our room if needed.
reviews.negatives: The room definitely required a makeover for example carpeting, window treatments, insufficient space lighting and electrical  outlets. The bathroom was outdated, bathroom sink vanity needed replacing as the countertop was faded, and shower water was not warm due to faulty shower head diverter needed replacement. Intermittent internet signal to our room on a daily basis.

reviews.title: Stayed here to be in the same hotel as visiting family.  It was nice but too expensive to just be a place to sleep.
reviews.positives: The hotel is in a good location. It was very clean and the staff were all friendly and accommodating.
reviews.negatives: The hotel was pretty expensive. You would think they would supply you with water but you have to pay an additional $5 for a bottle of water.  Parking was very expensive at $65 a day.

reviews.title: Nice
reviews.negatives: The blankets on the bed were too warm

reviews.title: It was very comfortable, convenient, and pleasant!
reviews.positives:
I enjoyed the complementary shuttle service to the airport, the social hour, and the ticket to USS Midway! The staff were also very nice and helpful. It would've been nice to know beforehand (before booking) that the hotel charged a destination fee ($29 per day, including taxes and fees) when arriving, to account for budgeting hotel accommodations.
 
The room was very clean and the location was close to the San Diego Conference Center/Gaslamp quarter/downtown/Petco stadium/museums along the bay/Balboa Park, which made it easy to explore San Diego for a few days just on foot. I didn't take advantage of the city bikes (comp'ed by the hotel up to 2 hrs), but that would've been nice to ride around too.
reviews.negatives: My room's showerhead could not close properly so was dripping almost the entire time... at one point the drain was also clogged, but then the cleaning staff fixed it two days later so it was good again. :)

reviews.title: Loved it,so much fun and easy to walk everywhere!
reviews.positives: It was very clean the pool stays open late and located in a great area!
reviews.negatives: I think the breakfast could be better!

reviews.title: Comfortable, easy and efficient.
reviews.positives: Room was comfortable for two, we got the king size bedroom on the 11th floor. Cozy and welcoming. We had a minor issue with the shower, when you would turn the water on “hot” it would make a loud vibrating noise.. I believe it was the old pipes adjusting to the temperature, not a huge deal, shower still worked properly just with a noise. Other than that lovely stay. Room service was awesome as well.
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: I was in San Diego for court, and the location was perfect, literally next door to the court house.
reviews.positives: Clean and luxurious. Great staff. Very friendly and knowledgeable.
reviews.negatives: I have no complaints

reviews.title: Nice stay downtown
reviews.positives: The hotel and location was nice.
reviews.negatives: $60 for parking. 2 days $120. That’s so expensive.

reviews.title: Good & bad
reviews.positives: The hotel was very clean, comfortable, perfect for a vacation. I loved everything about the hotel
reviews.negatives: I didn't like the fact that the girls at the bar stole my card numbers and continued to try in use my card through my trip and I new it was them because that was the only place I used my card at.Keep a lock on your card are use a tap card. Also I didn't like the fact the hotel charges you 60 dollars to park overnight and it's only 15 across the street which is also used by the hotel

reviews.title: Had a blast, lovely hotel! Staff was super nice!
reviews.positives: Very centrally located to all the things we wanted to do!

reviews.title: Swanky rooms, amazing breakfast!
reviews.positives: Great free breakfast (only 2 people) and Happy hour! Rooms were clean and even the city view one has a great view! Also amazing gym
reviews.negatives: Would be nice for extra free breakfast coupons for more than 2 ppl per room.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Room design was nice and bathroom was roomy.
reviews.negatives: Outside noise was distracting all day and night. Windows didn't help keep sound to a minimum. Sirens, trams, horns were just a start.

reviews.title: Hotel staff were very kind and customer service savvy.
reviews.negatives: Difficult to find the hotel parking.

reviews.title: Pleasant
reviews.negatives: help from staff to bring things from the car to the room

reviews.title: Great place to stay as long as the vents are quiet.
reviews.positives: Wonderful staff and extremely clean space.
reviews.negatives: Unfortunately, our room had extremely loud and nonstop noises in the vents. So much that my tv volume had to be up at the max. We were told maintenance will tend to it but unfortunately we just had to deal with it as we were already settled in. A bit of a disappointment for a 4 night stay.
